_description: De-AI audit results for two sections: one PASS, one FAIL with fix loop

verdict.summary: L1 precheck PASS (all_signals_clean). No AI writing patterns detected.

tiered_judgment.reason: All tiered tolerance checks passed. No critical/major/minor threshold violations.

signals.sentence: This groundbreaking study delves into the transformative potential of National Innovation Demonstration Zones.
signals.fix_suggestion: This study examines whether National Innovation Demonstration Zones increase regional entrepreneurship.

signals.sentence: Furthermore, it is crucial to note that... Moreover, one must consider... Additionally, evidence suggests...
signals.fix_suggestion: Remove mechanical transitions. Let ideas flow from logical connection, not signal words.
Sentence length CV=0.16 (need >=0.35). Current: all sentences 18-22 words. Mix 8-word punchy sentences with 30-word elaborations.

verdict.summary: Multiple AI writing patterns: inflated vocabulary, connector stacking, and mechanical rhythm.

hard_caps_triggered: HC-1: AI cliché 'groundbreaking' + 'delves into' detected (vocab capped at 60%)

reasons: HC-1: 2 AI clichés detected (vocabulary capped at 60%)

fix_details: Replaced 'groundbreaking study delves into the transformative potential' → 'study examines whether'
Removed 3 mechanical connectors (Furthermore/Moreover/Additionally), restructured paragraph flow
Varied sentence lengths: added 2 short sentences (8-10 words), extended 1 to 35 words

tiered_judgment.reason: All signals resolved after fix iteration 1.
